tracks.rawText: 7:59Neon Oasisv5.5Sparse deep house techno-dub-house with an Egyptian modal vocal line centered on oud or ney, wrapped in dub delay throws and long tape echo tails, Minimal 4/4 kick, sub-bass pulses, filtered chord stabs, muted percussion, and roomy reverb create a dark, hypnotic, deep-club texturePublishRemix
tracks.title: Neon Oasis

tracks.rawText: 3:04Duro Contra El Murov5.5Reggaeton daniflow with crisp dembow at 96 BPM, punchy 808 sub-bass, bright synth brass stabs, and chopped vocal ad-libs, Playful Latin percussion, syncopated kick-snare pocket, filtered risers, and cheeky call-and-response hooks; glossy club mix with tight sidechain, short room reverb, and energetic bouncePublishRemix
tracks.title: Duro Contra El Muro

tracks.rawText: 2:48stirring it upv5.5Grit Lantern is a high-speed neo-Balkan brass experiment built around extreme wind-instrument virtuosity, abrupt rhythmic shifts, and machine-gun melodic patterns, The track imagines a small ensemble of elite brass and woodwind players pushing folk, classical, and cinematic music into a raw new territory — fast, complex, aggressive, and alive, Not polished for comfort, Built for motion, tension, chaos, precision, and firePublishRemix
tracks.title: stirring it up
